'''Arcona Mineral Harvest Corporation''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company. Unlike their competitor, [[Offworld Mining Corporation]], they respected their employees, who shared in the net profits. Around [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]], the new chief operations manager, [[Clat'Ha]], tried to get some of Offworld's workers by buying their contracts. The plan led to bitter infighting between the two companies. Despite this feud, Offworld Mining and Arcona Mineral Harvest were both members of the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]].<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

{{Company-stub}}
